gap_summaries.title: §9.2 blocking CONCERNS not implemented
gap_summaries.description: route_gate_verdict treated all CONCERNS as action=done/commit=True. Spec §9.2 says 'profile may mark some categories CONCERNS as blocking (e.g. security)'. Added optional profile kwarg with concerns_blocking list; matched CONCERNS categories route to remediate/park.

gap_summaries.title: §11.1 runbook not linked from SECURITY.md
gap_summaries.description: Spec line 220: 'Linked from docs/SECURITY.md'. SECURITY.md had no reference to the gate troubleshooting runbook. Added H2 section with link.

gap_summaries.title: GateStartedAudit emitted before filelock acquisition
gap_summaries.description: GateStartedAudit was emitted before the filelock was acquired. If lock acquisition failed (GateConcurrencyError), an orphan GateStarted event existed without a corresponding GateCompleted. Moved emission inside the lock scope.

production_readiness_notes: All 2551 tests pass (2549 existing + 2 skipped + 8 new)
ruff check clean across src and tests
npm run verify passes (test:python, pack:dry-run, test:cli, test:smoke)
Backwards-compatible: profile kwarg on route_gate_verdict defaults to None (no blocking)
